closure_text: Deviation attributed to calibration drift on gauge 39; recalibrated and verified against standard.
Sampling error under AQL plan corrected; inspector re-qualified on the revised sampling table.
Closure justified by 'trend within historical norms' without attaching the supporting data.
Handling damage identified at packaging; foam insert redesigned and first-article re-approved.
Process deviation from a missed cleaning step; 5S audit added to the shift changeover checklist.
Deviation attributed to calibration drift on gauge 24; recalibrated and verified against standard.
Investigation closed same day as opened with identical wording to two other unrelated lots.
Containment isolated 33 affected units; supplier notified and incoming inspection tightened.
